Choose the color used for the stacked message suffix.
chat-utilities.settings.reset_row.toolti: Restore this setting to its default
This setting is already the default value
chat-utilities.settings.mod_primary_colo: Accent color for this menu: section markers, Settings tab highlight, Done-style buttons, and related UI. Opens the color editor.
chat-utilities.settings.symbol_palette_i:
How color and style codes are inserted when you pick them in the chat symbol menu (left strip): Vanilla uses &; Section symbol uses § (Java Edition chat); MiniMessage uses shorthand tags such as <red>, <b>, <i>, <u>, <st>, <obf>.
Click the button to cycle: Vanilla → Section symbol → MiniMessage.
chat-utilities.settings.check_for_update: Periodically checks GitHub for a newer release and shows an Update row in the menu sidebar when one is available.
chat-utilities.settings.chat_search_bar_: Below Chat: places the search row in the gap between the bottom of the expanded chat column and the chat input. Above Chat: places it just above the top of the expanded chat column (same footprint as when chat is fully open), still above the messages.
chat-utilities.settings.image_preview.en: When enabled, hovering a whitelisted http(s) image link in chat shows a thumbnail. Shift+click the link or use the keybind under Controls → Chat Utilities for fullscreen. Configure allowed domains below.
chat-utilities.settings.image_preview.wh: Hostnames allowed for image previews (e.g. imgur.com matches i.imgur.com).
chat-utilities.settings.image_preview.al: When enabled, the Allowed Domains whitelist is ignored and any http(s) image URL can be previewed (still requires an image file extension).
When enabled, prepends a time prefix to new lines in the main chat and in chat windows. Use Java DateTimeFormatter pattern syntax (US locale), e.g. '['hh:mm:ss a'] ' for 12-hour time with AM/PM in brackets.
chat-utilities.settings.chat_timestamp_c: Color for the timestamp prefix. Default matches gray §7.
chat-utilities.settings.open_menu.toolti:
Key used to open this menu from anywhere in-game.
Left-click the button, then press a key.
Right-click to clear the binding.
chat-utilities.settings.image_preview_fu:
Key used to open fullscreen preview for the last hovered whitelisted image in chat.
Left-click the button, then press a key.
Right-click to clear the binding.

Mouse binding used to open fullscreen preview when clicking an image preview or link in chat.
Left-click the button, then click a preview with your chosen modifiers.
Right-click to reset to Shift+LMB.
chat-utilities.settings.reset_all.toolti: Restores every Chat Utilities setting and control: open-menu key, copy-click bindings, chat copy and symbol-menu code styles, chat options, smooth chat, chat history, and message stacking. Click once to arm, then click again within a few seconds to confirm.
All Chat Utilities options and controls (including symbol menu code style) were restored to defaults.
Click a chat line with this mouse button and modifiers to copy plain visible text (no formatting codes).
chat-utilities.settings.copy_formatted_b:
Click a chat line with this mouse button and modifiers to copy formatted text.
Style follows “Chat Copy Style” in Click to Copy Settings.
chat-utilities.settings.chat_symbol_sele: Shows or hides the quick symbol picker on the chat screen.
chat-utilities.settings.chat_panel_backg: How opaque chat panel backgrounds are.
Opacity of chat message backgrounds while chat is closed/unfocused.
Opacity of chat message backgrounds while chat is open/focused.
chat-utilities.settings.chat_bar_backgro: Opacity of the chat input bar background while chat is open.
chat-utilities.settings.chat_text_shadow: Draws a drop shadow behind chat text in the main HUD chat and in chat windows.
chat-utilities.settings.smooth_chat.tool: When enabled, new chat lines fade in smoothly, the chat input bar slides up when you open chat, and the sliders below apply.
chat-utilities.settings.smooth_chat_dela: How long each new line takes to reach full opacity (milliseconds). Drag the slider; values move in 50 ms steps.
chat-utilities.settings.smooth_chat_bar_: How long the chat input bar takes to slide into place when you open chat (milliseconds). Drag the slider; values move in 50 ms steps.
chat-utilities.settings.longer_chat_hist: When enabled, the main HUD chat and chat windows keep more lines than vanilla (100). Use “History Limit” to choose how many.
chat-utilities.settings.chat_history_lim: Maximum number of chat messages kept in memory for the main chat and each chat window. Drag the slider; values move in steps of 50. Requires Longer Chat History.
chat-utilities.settings.stack_repeated_m: When the same message arrives twice in a row (same text after stripping formatting), combines into one line and appends a gray count such as (x3). Applies to the main chat HUD and chat windows.
chat-utilities.settings.chat_bar_menu_bu: Shows or hides the Chat Bar Settings (gear) button next to the symbol picker on the chat screen. Click it to open Chat Utilities, same as /chatutils. When hidden, the symbol button moves right to use the freed space.
Shows a filter row when chat is open. Position is controlled by “Search bar position” in this section. Matches the same literal and regex: rules as chat window patterns. Use Jump on a line (when filtering) to clear the filter and scroll that message into view.
chat-utilities.settings.click_to_copy.to: Master switch for Ctrl+click (and your custom bindings) copying from chat.
chat-utilities.settings.copy_formatted_s:
Vanilla: same legacy codes as section symbol, but uses & instead of § (common for server configs and Bukkit-style plugins).
Section symbol: Java Edition legacy formatting (paragraph-sign codes); colors outside the 16 named colors use full RGB hex.
MiniMessage: Adventure-style tags such as <red>, <#RRGGBB>, and decoration aliases <b>, <i>, <u>, <st>, <obf>.
Click the button to cycle: Vanilla → Section symbol → MiniMessage.
Choose a profile JSON file to merge, or cancel and use JSON from the clipboard.
Choose where to save profile JSON. JSON is always copied to the clipboard as well.
JSON copied to clipboard (no file saved).
Pick a file or copy profile JSON to the clipboard.
No new profiles were added from that JSON.
That text is not valid JSON.
chat-utilities.toast.copy_chat.title: Chat Utilities
chat-utilities.chat.symbol_palette.title: Chat Symbols
chat-utilities.layout_mode.help.drag: Drag chat windows to move them.
chat-utilities.layout_mode.help.resize: Resize using the edges and corners of a window.
chat-utilities.layout_mode.help.shift_re: Hold Shift on edges/corners (except bottom-right) for precise resize without grid snap.
chat-utilities.layout_mode.help.shift_se: Hold Shift and drag the bottom-right corner to change text size (snaps to 100% when near default).
chat-utilities.layout_mode.help.compact:
Drag to move. Edges/corners resize.
Esc exits. Shift (not bottom-right): fine resize.
Shift + bottom-right: resize + text scale (snaps near 100%).
chat-utilities.command_aliases.title: Command Aliases
chat-utilities.command_aliases.descripti: Map a shorthand slash command to another; arguments are preserved. Enter names with or without a leading slash; they are stored without it. When several aliases could match, the longest alias wins.
chat-utilities.settings.tab_unread_badge: When enabled, shows an unread count badge on non-selected chat tabs that received new messages while you were on another tab. Badge color is set below.
chat-utilities.settings.always_show_unre: When chat is closed, show a compact strip of tabs that have unread messages (if the window has multiple tabs). Unread count badges follow “Tab Unread Badges”.
chat-utilities.settings.unread_badge.sty: Shape of the unread count badge on chat window tabs.
chat-utilities.settings.unread_badge.col: Color used for unread count badges on chat window tabs and on the unread-only tab strip.
chat-utilities.settings.ignore_self_chat: If a chat action matches your username, do not play sounds or highlight when you are the one speaking (heuristic: lines starting with <You>).
chat-utilities.settings.preserve_vanilla: When enabled, leaving a server or single-player world does not wipe the vanilla chat log. Turn off if you prefer a clean log each time you connect. Full clears that include sent-command history still run when the game requests them.
